label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 17

extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC attacked on Angliru's steep ramps, won stage with VINGEGAARD while KUSS struggled, holding red jersey by only 8 seconds after teammates refused to wait
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma's three co-leaders raced each other on final climb; Kuss requested slower pace via radio, teammates ignored him.
BAHRAIN Victorious overcommitted resources early with Caruso/Poels pacing, Landa isolated before steepest Angliru ramps at 6.5km.
VINGEGAARD deliberately took 6 bonus seconds sprint without passing Roglic, tactical calculation to pressure Kuss's 8-second jersey margin.
UAE Emirates completely collapsed on 23% Angliru ramps; Ayuso went backwards early, exposing weakness on extreme gradients.

rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: negative: radioed for teammates to slow pace when dropped on Angliru; saved jersey only via bonus seconds, margin collapsed to 8s
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: attacked despite supposed domestique role, won stage making statement against team orders to support Kuss
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: strong enough to win but deliberately took second for 6-second bonus, playing political game within team
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Bahrain's early pacing strategy backfired; Landa isolated on steepest sections, couldn't challenge for stage win
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: negative: went backwards early on Angliru's extreme ramps, UAE support structure collapsed completely
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: neutral: attacked to chase down early break despite unclear UAE team strategy, questioning continues
rider_signals.UIJTDEBROEKS Cian: positive: Bora domestique stayed with leaders longer than expected on Angliru's hardest sections
